questions.q: Read: 'The community centre will be closed for renovations from March 15 to April 10. Members can use the temporary facility at 230 Oak Street during this period.' — When will the centre reopen?

The library is now open on holidays

questions.q: Read: 'Employees who have completed their probation period are eligible for the dental plan. New hires must wait 90 days before enrolling.' — Who can enroll in the dental plan?
Read: 'The parking lot will be repaved next week. Staff are asked to park on the street or use public transit. A $5 daily transit subsidy will be provided.' — What will staff receive?
Read: 'The potluck lunch has been moved from Friday to Thursday due to a scheduling conflict with the fire drill. Please bring your dishes by 11:30 AM.' — Why was the potluck moved?
Read: 'All tenants must give 60 days written notice before moving out. Failure to do so may result in forfeiture of the security deposit.' — What happens without proper notice?
Read: 'The winter clothing drive runs from November 1 to December 15. Donations can be dropped off at any fire station. Items should be clean and in good condition.' — Where can you donate?

Read: 'Starting January 1, plastic bags will no longer be provided at checkout. Customers are encouraged to bring reusable bags. Paper bags will be available for $0.25 each.' — What will happen to plastic bags?
opts: They will no longer be available

questions.q: Read: 'The company is offering a wellness program that includes free gym access, nutrition counselling, and mental health support. Enrollment opens next Monday.' — What is NOT part of the program?
Read: 'Flight AC 847 to Vancouver has been delayed by 3 hours due to mechanical issues. Passengers can collect meal vouchers at the service desk.' — Why is the flight delayed?

Read: 'The school board has approved a new policy requiring all students to wear uniforms starting September. Parents can purchase uniforms from approved vendors listed on the school website.' — When does the uniform policy start?
Read: 'Residents of Maple Heights will experience a planned power outage on Saturday from 8 AM to 2 PM. This is necessary for electrical grid upgrades.' — How long will the outage last?
Read: 'The farmer's market has moved to an indoor location for the winter months. It will operate every Saturday from 9 AM to 1 PM at the recreation centre.' — What changed about the market?
Read: 'Candidates for the management position must have at least 5 years of experience and a university degree. Bilingual candidates will be given preference.' — What gives a candidate an advantage?
Read: 'The annual block party will take place on July 1st from 2 PM to 10 PM. There will be live music, food trucks, and a fireworks display at 9:30 PM.' — When are the fireworks?

Read: 'Water usage restrictions are in effect from June to September. Lawn watering is only permitted on odd-numbered days for houses with odd-numbered addresses.' — When can house #43 water the lawn?
Read: 'The swimming pool will close at 6 PM instead of 9 PM during the month of October due to reduced staffing. Regular hours resume in November.' — What is the reason for shorter hours?
Read: 'To qualify for the early bird discount, registrations must be received by March 31. After that date, the regular fee of $150 applies.' — What happens after March 31?

Read: 'The new express bus route connects downtown to the airport in 25 minutes, compared to the previous 45-minute local route. Service runs every 15 minutes during peak hours.' — How much time does the express save?
Read: 'Pet owners in the building must register their animals with management and pay a $200 refundable deposit. Dogs must be leashed in common areas.' — Is the pet deposit refundable?
Read: 'The company will match employee donations to registered charities up to $500 per year. Submit receipts to HR by December 15.' — What is the maximum the company will match?
Read: 'The pharmacy is open Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM. It is closed on Sundays and holidays.' — When is the pharmacy closed?
Read: 'Recycling pickup has been changed from Wednesdays to Thursdays effective immediately. Please ensure bins are placed curbside by 7 AM.' — What time should bins be out by?

Read: 'The hiking trail is rated as moderate difficulty. It is 8 km round trip and takes approximately 3 hours. Hikers should bring water and wear proper footwear.' — How long is the trail round trip?
Read: 'Free parking is available for the first two hours. After that, the rate is $3 per hour. Monthly passes are available for $80.' — How much is parking for 4 hours?
Read: 'The daycare centre accepts children aged 18 months to 5 years. A valid immunization record is required at enrollment. Spaces are limited.' — What document is needed?
Read: 'The building's fire alarm system will be tested on Tuesday between 10 AM and 12 PM. No evacuation is necessary during the test.' — Do residents need to evacuate?
opts: Only if the alarm is loud

questions.q: Read: 'The return policy allows exchanges within 30 days of purchase with original receipt. Items must be in unused condition with tags attached.' — What is required for a return?
opts: Receipt and unused item with tags

questions.q: Read: 'Snow removal is the responsibility of homeowners. Sidewalks must be cleared within 24 hours after a snowfall. Failure to comply may result in a $100 fine.' — What is the fine for not clearing snow?
Read: 'The new employee orientation takes place every first Monday of the month at 9 AM in Conference Room B. Attendance is mandatory for all new hires.' — Where is the orientation?
Read: 'Volunteers are needed for the food bank this weekend. Shifts are 4 hours long. Volunteers will receive a certificate of participation and a free lunch.' — What do volunteers get?
Read: 'The elevator will be out of service for maintenance from 8 AM to 5 PM on Thursday. Residents on upper floors should plan accordingly.' — When will the elevator be fixed?
Read: 'The language school offers group classes for $200/month and private tutoring for $50/hour. New students receive a free assessment test.' — How much is private tutoring?
Read: 'The bus pass for seniors aged 65 and over costs $45/month, compared to the regular adult pass at $90/month. Photo ID is required.' — How much do seniors save?
Read: 'The clinic accepts walk-in patients Monday through Wednesday. Appointments are required Thursday and Friday. The clinic is closed on weekends.' — When can you walk in?
Read: 'Construction on Main Street will cause lane closures until the end of August. Drivers should use Elm Street as an alternative route.' — What is the alternative route?
Read: 'The gym membership includes access to the pool, sauna, and fitness classes. Personal training sessions cost an additional $40 each.' — What costs extra?
Read: 'The after-school program runs from 3:30 PM to 6 PM on weekdays. It includes homework help, snacks, and supervised activities. Cost is $15 per day.' — What time does the program start?
Read: 'Guests checking in after 10 PM must use the side entrance and present their booking confirmation to the night receptionist.' — What do late guests need?
opts: A phone call to the manager

opts: It has reduced the sap collection period

questions.q: Under Canadian law, employers must provide employees with a 30-minute meal break after every five consecutive hours of work. This break may be paid or unpaid depending on whether the employee is free to leave the workplace. What determines whether the meal break is paid?
opts: Whether the employee can leave the workplace

questions.q: The settlement agency offers free language assessment tests for newcomers. Results help determine the appropriate language class level. Tests are available in English and French by appointment only. How can newcomers access the language assessment?

According to the lease agreement, the landlord is responsible for major repairs such as plumbing, heating, and structural issues. Tenants are responsible for minor maintenance like replacing light bulbs and keeping the unit clean. Who handles plumbing repairs?

A recent survey found that 67% of Canadian employers consider soft skills more important than technical skills when hiring. Communication, teamwork, and problem-solving were the most valued traits. Which soft skill was NOT mentioned as most valued?

The pharmacy closes at 9 PM on weekdays but offers an after-hours emergency line. Prescriptions called in before 8 PM will be ready for same-day pickup. By when must prescriptions be called in for same-day service?

Canada's Official Languages Act ensures that federal services are available in both English and French. However, this requirement applies only to federal institutions, not to provincial or municipal services. Which services must be bilingual under the Act?

The co-op board has approved a new pet policy. Residents may keep one cat or one dog under 25 kilograms. All pets must be registered with the building management within 30 days. What is the weight limit for dogs?

Immigrant professionals often face credential recognition challenges in Canada. Foreign degrees may need to be assessed by a designated organization before the holder can practise in their field. What must happen before foreign professionals can work in their field?
opts: They must pass a language test only
Nothing — all foreign degrees are accepted

questions.q: The school district has implemented a new anti-bullying program that includes peer mediation. Students trained as mediators help resolve conflicts before they escalate. Reports of bullying have dropped by 30% since the program began. By how much did bullying reports decrease?

Driving in Canada during winter requires special precautions. Many provinces mandate winter tires between October and March. Fines for non-compliance can range from $200 to $600. What is the maximum fine for not having winter tires where required?

The volunteer coordinator mentioned that shifts run from 9 AM to 1 PM and from 2 PM to 6 PM. Volunteers must commit to at least two shifts per week for a minimum of three months. What is the minimum commitment period?

Research suggests that remote work increases productivity by 13% on average. However, it can also lead to feelings of isolation among employees who lack regular social interaction. What negative effect can remote work have?

The warranty covers manufacturing defects for two years from the date of purchase. Physical damage caused by misuse is not covered. Customers must retain their original receipt to make a claim. What is NOT covered by the warranty?

The Canadian government provides a one-time grant of up to $500 through the Canada Learning Bond for children from low-income families. Additional payments of $100 per year are made until the child turns 15. When do the annual payments stop?

The company dress code states that business casual is acceptable Monday through Thursday. On Fridays, employees may wear jeans and casual shirts. Client-facing staff must always dress in business formal. What must client-facing staff wear?

To open a bank account in Canada, newcomers typically need two pieces of identification. A passport and a permanent resident card are commonly accepted. Some banks may also require proof of address. How many IDs are usually required?

The city has introduced a composting program for all single-family homes. Green bins are collected every week between April and November, and every two weeks during winter months. How often are green bins collected in winter?

The Employee Assistance Program (EAP) provides confidential counselling services at no cost to employees. Services include mental health support, financial advice, and legal consultation. Sessions are limited to six per issue per year. How many sessions per issue are available annually?

A study from the University of British Columbia found that exposure to green spaces reduces stress hormones by up to 20%. Urban planners are now incorporating more parks into city designs. By how much can green spaces reduce stress hormones?

The conference registration fee includes access to all keynote speeches and workshops. Meals are provided on the first day only. Participants who wish to attend the networking dinner must pay an additional $75. What costs extra?

In British Columbia, employers must pay employees within 48 hours of their last day of work if they are terminated. If an employee quits, wages must be paid within six days. How soon must a terminated employee be paid?

The apartment building has implemented a quiet hours policy from 10 PM to 7 AM. Violations may result in a written warning for the first offence and a fine for subsequent offences. What happens on the first violation?

Canada Post delivers mail Monday through Friday in most areas. Saturday delivery is available only for certain express and priority services. Regular mail is not delivered on weekends or statutory holidays. When is regular mail NOT delivered?

The training manual states that new hires must shadow a senior employee for their first two weeks. After shadowing, they complete an online assessment before being assigned independent tasks. What follows the two-week shadowing period?

According to Statistics Canada, the country's population surpassed 40 million in 2023. Immigration accounted for approximately 98% of that year's population growth. What drove most of Canada's population growth in 2023?

The museum offers free admission on the first Sunday of every month. Group tours of 10 or more people receive a 20% discount at any time. Students with valid ID get 50% off. What discount do student visitors receive?

Water conservation measures in Calgary require residents to water their lawns only on designated days. Even-numbered addresses water on Wednesdays and Saturdays, while odd-numbered addresses water on Thursdays and Sundays. When can a house numbered 42 water its lawn?

The HR department announced that performance reviews will now be conducted quarterly instead of annually. Managers must submit feedback forms within five business days of each review meeting. How often are performance reviews conducted now?

The daycare centre requires children to be picked up by 6 PM. A late fee of $10 is charged for every 15 minutes past the deadline. Parents who are late three times may lose their child's spot. How much is the late fee per 15 minutes?

Canadian banks are required to offer a basic low-cost account to all Canadians. These accounts typically have a low monthly fee or are free, and include at least 12 transactions per month. What is the minimum number of transactions included?

The food bank distributes hampers every Tuesday and Thursday from 10 AM to 2 PM. First-time visitors must bring photo identification and proof of address. Returning clients need only their client card. What must first-time visitors bring?
opts: Photo ID and proof of address

questions.q: A memo from the IT department warns that phishing emails have increased by 40% this quarter. Employees should not click on suspicious links and must report any unusual emails to IT immediately. By how much have phishing emails increased?

The provincial health plan covers most medically necessary services, including doctor visits and hospital stays. Dental care, vision care, and prescription drugs are generally not covered. Which service is typically NOT covered?

The parking garage offers monthly passes at $150 or daily rates of $12. The garage is open from 6 AM to midnight. Vehicles left after midnight may be towed at the owner's expense. What happens to vehicles left after midnight?

New immigrants to Canada can access free settlement services, including language training, help finding a job, and orientation to life in Canada. These services are funded by the federal government through Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada. Who funds settlement services?

The airline's carry-on policy allows one personal item and one standard bag. The standard bag must not exceed 23 cm x 40 cm x 55 cm. Items exceeding these dimensions must be checked. How many carry-on items are permitted?

The neighbourhood watch program meets on the last Wednesday of every month at the community hall. Residents are encouraged to report suspicious activity by calling the non-emergency police line. When does the group meet?
opts: The first Wednesday of each month
The last Wednesday of each month

questions.q: Service Canada processes Social Insurance Number (SIN) applications at its offices across the country. Processing is immediate when done in person with proper documentation. By mail, it takes approximately 20 business days. How long does SIN processing take by mail?

The company's travel policy reimburses economy-class airfare for domestic trips. Business class is permitted only for flights longer than six hours. All bookings must be made through the corporate travel portal. When is business class allowed?

The City of Toronto requires all rental properties to be registered with the municipal licensing department. Landlords who fail to register face fines of up to $10,000. Registration must be renewed annually. What is the maximum fine for not registering?

The scholarship is available to full-time students with a GPA of 3.5 or higher. Applicants must also demonstrate financial need and community involvement. The deadline for applications is November 30. What GPA is required for the scholarship?

Electric vehicles (EVs) are becoming increasingly popular in Canada. The federal government offers a rebate of up to $5,000 for eligible EV purchases. Some provinces provide additional incentives on top of the federal rebate. How much is the federal EV rebate?

Workplace harassment complaints must be filed within one year of the incident. The employer is required to investigate within 90 days of receiving the complaint. Both parties are entitled to confidentiality during the process. What is the investigation deadline?

The grocery store's loyalty program awards one point for every dollar spent. Once a customer accumulates 1,000 points, they receive a $10 discount. Points expire after 12 months of inactivity. When do loyalty points expire?

A notice on the elevator states that the building's fire alarm system will be tested on Thursday between 10 AM and 12 PM. Residents do not need to evacuate during the test but should expect intermittent alarm sounds. What should residents do during the test?
opts: Stay home and expect alarm sounds

questions.q: The Canadian Pension Plan (CPP) provides retirement income to those who have contributed during their working years. The standard age to begin receiving CPP is 65, but you can start as early as 60 with a reduced amount. What is the earliest age to receive CPP?

The yoga studio offers a drop-in rate of $18 per class or a 10-class pass for $140. The pass is valid for 90 days from the date of purchase. First-time visitors receive one free class. How much does a 10-class pass cost?

The hiring committee reviewed 200 applications and shortlisted 15 candidates for interviews. Of those, five were invited for a second round. The successful candidate will start on May 1. How many candidates reached the second round?
